_doc: Manufacturer 'Number of Hinges per Door' load charts (series-level — apply to every hinge of that series). AXES are confirmed against the page text layer. CELL mapping is best-effort read from the chart diagram and is flagged needs_verification — surfaced in the UI so a human can confirm it against the rendered chart. This is the data the engine's hinge-count derivation (ENGINE_V2_FIT.md §7) needs.

charts.title: Number of Hinges Per Door
charts.note: Diagonal staircase reading (weight band + max door height -> hinge count). Confirm the cell thresholds against the chart image; the chart also implies more hinges let a given weight go taller.

charts.title: Number of Hinges per Door
charts.note: 2-D grid: door height (inches, y) x hinge-count zones (x), weight (pounds) in the grid. Height->hinge thresholds are best-effort; weight boundaries within each zone need a human read against the chart image.
